render_profile.notes: pose-control test using SDPose + OpenPose ControlNet to force phone-call posture

prompt_build.local_positive: holding smartphone to ear while answering a call, body slightly tense, intimate suspense, soft shadows, side profile, upper body medium close-up
prompt_build.local_negative: awkward ear-phone placement, distorted mouth, broken jawline, pen, stylus, pencil, feminine face, androgynous idol look, glamour portrait, fashion photography
